---
name: "Feature request"
about: "Propose improvements, workflow changes, or new functionality."
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary
Describe the requested capability and the problem it resolves.

## Motivation
Why is this change valuable to the team or users?

## Success criteria
List measurable outcomes that define completion.

## Alternatives considered
What other options were evaluated and why were they rejected?

## Additional context
Add links, mockups, or references that help explain the request.
